title: Vicia paucijuga

taxonomy: Vicia paucijuga is classified within the family Fabaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as legumes. This family includes a wide range of species, from shrubs to trees, and from annuals to perennials. Vicia paucijuga is further classified within the subfamily Faboideae, which is one of the largest subfamilies within the Fabaceae family. The genus Vicia itself is a group of annual or perennial legumes native to Europe, Asia, and Africa, and Vicia paucijuga is one of the many species within this genus. The species Vicia paucijuga is native to parts of Asia, where it grows in a variety of habitats.
